element_introduction_order.mastery_context: primary offensive tool for ground targets
three-axis flight control fundamental to all missions
optional difficulty modifier enabling competitive advantage

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous combat tension with variable intensity across 19-mission campaign; cooperative mode emphasizes sustained engagement while competitive mode structures discrete engagement cycles

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to three-axis helicopter control with basic enemy encounters
notable_spikes: real heli mode activation increases control complexity and reduces stability assists
guided missile conservation becomes critical in later missions

notable_level_patterns.description: 19 discrete missions in single-player/cooperative mode with contained objectives; competitive mode replaces mission structure with direct player-vs-player helicopter dueling
players must balance machine gun (unlimited), rockets (moderate capacity), and guided missiles (limited) across mission duration, creating resource-scarcity tension peaks
3D flight space encourages vertical positioning strategy; altitude control via collective lever becomes core tactical element separate from forward movement
